scripts.dev:api: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then exec ./.venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --env-file .env --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload; else exec ./.venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload; fi'
scripts.dev:ui:wait: sh -c 'until curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8000/health >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.25; done; vite --config frontend/ui/vite.config.mjs'
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,ui -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ui:wait"
scripts.dev:stop: sh -c 'pkill -f "vite --config frontend/ui/vite.config.mjs" || true; pkill -f "uvicorn app.main:app" || true; fuser -k 4173/tcp 2>/dev/null || true; fuser -k 8000/tcp 2>/dev/null || true'
